entities.name: reflection_orchestrator.py
entities.context: Main Python script that orchestrates the reflection processing pipeline with suggester and synthesizer stages

entities.name: reflection_ingest_v2.py
entities.context: Worker 1 script that handles ingestion of reflection audio files

entities.name: reflection_classifier.py
entities.context: Worker 2 script that classifies ingested reflections

entities.name: Drive API
entities.context: Google Drive API used for accessing reflection files from folder

entities.name: Registry
entities.context: JSON-based tracking system for reflection status with phases and metadata

entities.name: Suggester
entities.context: Optional pipeline component invoked via --run-suggester flag

entities.name: Synthesizer
entities.context: Optional pipeline component invoked via --run-synthesizer flag for non-critical synthesis

entities.name: Registry Schema
entities.context: Data structure tracking reflection lifecycle: id, source_file, transcript_path, phases, status

entities.name: Per-Worker Failures
entities.context: Error handling pattern where pipeline continues and marks items for manual review

entities.name: Critical Failures
entities.context: Error handling pattern that aborts cycle on Drive API or registry corruption

entities.name: Recoverable Failures
entities.context: Error handling pattern that logs and continues on transcript, block, or synthesizer failures

relationships.context: Orchestrator invokes ingest script as Worker 1 dependency
Orchestrator invokes classifier as Worker 2 dependency
Orchestrator accesses Drive folder by ID for reflection files
Orchestrator reads and updates registry to track reflection status
Schema defines the JSON structure used by the registry
Both are non-critical error patterns that allow pipeline continuation
Drive API unavailability triggers critical failure abort
